'''Lun Deverin''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Duros/Legends|Duros]] sensor officer aboard the pirate ship ''[[Free Lance]]''; he served under [[Urias Xhaxin]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Dark Tide I: Onslaught]]'' {{1st}}
